title: Traditional British Steamed Pudding
description: A classic British dessert made with a light and malty pudding, steamed to perfection.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the pudding mix and milk. Whisk until smooth.
2. Add the steamed water and whisk until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 1-quart pudding basin or mold.
4. Cover the pudding with a piece of parchment paper or a clean cloth.
5. Place the pudding in a large pot or steamer basket, and add enough boiling water to come halfway up the side of the pudding basin.
6. Cover the pot and steam the pudding for 2 hours, or until it is firm and set.
7. Remove the pudding from the pot and let it cool slightly.
8. Serve the pudding warm, topped with British butter and granulated sugar.
